message:
fix(install): Redirect log functions to stderr

Log functions (log_info, log_success, log_warn, log_step) were writing
to stdout, which polluted the output when other functions tried to
capture stdout. This caused the install script to fail with confusing
error messages like "Skills directory not found" even when the
directory existed.

All log functions now write to stderr so they don't interfere with
command substitution captures.

Fixes #1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
